name: American Express Co.
lede: Amex runs seven capability centers across five Indian cities. Chennai, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai and New Delhi, covering CoE, gbs, gcc/gic and sales & marketing, built over 32 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amex office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American Express Co. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amex runs 7 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Chennai, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai, New Delhi), covering CoE, gbs, gcc/gic and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 297 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amex operate in India?
faq.a: Amex operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amex have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amex's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Gurugram, Bengaluru, Mumbai and New Delhi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amex run in India?
faq.a: Amex runs CoE, gbs, gcc/gic and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amex's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amex's India centers employ in the >10K range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amex's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 297 leaders at Amex's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
